message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync =0.2.9 → =0.3.0 (crates.io v0.3.0)

Keeps the exact-pin (`=`) semantic — pi_agent_rust's CI specifically
verifies no sibling-checkout dependencies and requires a deterministic
single-version resolution. The `=` qualifier ensures the published
crates.io 0.3.0 is used, not any future 0.3.x release, until the
next coordinated bump.

- Cargo.toml: `asupersync = { version = "=0.2.9", default-features =
  false, features = ["tls-native-roots"] }` → `{ version = "=0.3.0",
  default-features = false, features = ["tls-native-roots"] }` in
  [workspace.dependencies].
- Cargo.toml: the matching entry under [workspace.dev-dependencies]
  (`features = ["test-internals"]`) bumped the same way.
- The commented-out local-development [patch.crates-io] template at
  the bottom of the file is left untouched — documented workflow for
  local asupersync iteration, intentionally not committed.
- Cargo.lock: refreshed via `cargo update` to resolve asupersync
  0.3.0 (plus transitive wat/winnow refresh unrelated to asupersync).
